introSection: Kiddie Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster built by American manufacturer Miler Manufacturing previously located at Williams Grove Amusement Park in Mechanicsburg, Pennsylvania, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Roller Coaster opened at Fantasy Farm Amusement Park in Middletown, Ohio, USA between 1963 and 1965. The ride closed in 1991 and was relocated to Williams Grove Amusement Park, where it operated under the name Kiddie Coaster.

fullText:
Kiddie Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster built by American manufacturer Miler Manufacturing previously located at Williams Grove Amusement Park in Mechanicsburg, Pennsylvania, USA.

Roller Coaster opened at Fantasy Farm Amusement Park in Middletown, Ohio, USA between 1963 and 1965. The ride closed in 1991 and was relocated to Williams Grove Amusement Park, where it operated under the name Kiddie Coaster.



Black track and supports.
